test.name: TS-F04-TC01: Admin Login Successfully

kw.name: Open Browser And Login As Admin
Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Waiting for login page to load
kw.arg: Waiting for login page to load
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เข้าสู่ระบบ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Waiting for home page after login
kw.arg: Waiting for home page after login
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
Open browser, navigate to login page, and login as admin

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'css:input#identifier' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'css:input#identifier' but did not.

kw.name: Page Should Contain Element
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Close All Browser Windows
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Capture screenshot and close all browser windows

test.doc: Admin logs in successfully with valid credentials
test.status: Page should have contained element 'css:input#identifier' but did not.

test.name: TS-F04-TC02: View Admin Log Page And Display All Logs

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Logs To Load
Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword If
kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.
Wait for logs table to load

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait For Logs To Load
kw.doc: Wait for logs table to load

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the number of elements matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Logs should be displayed for existing username
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Close All Browser Windows
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
Capture screenshot and close all browser windows
